description_long: This object is a projector with a rectangular body, featuring a prominent lens area and a visible projection of a technical drawing or blueprint on one side. The casing appears to be made of a hard, dark-colored plastic or metal, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. There are window-like features on one side, possibly for ventilation or aesthetic design, and the projection surface is clearly visible in several views. The object is compact and likely designed for tabletop or portable use, with no visible mounting brackets or ceiling attachments. No brand logo or control panel is visible, and the lens type is not clearly distinguishable from the images. The overall design is functional and utilitarian, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, classrooms, or public spaces.
description: A compact, dark-colored projector with a visible projection of a technical drawing and window-like features on one side. The body is smooth and functional, with no visible branding or control panel.
description_view_0: The front and side of the projector are visible, showing the projection of a technical drawing and window-like features.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the projection surface and the edge of the window-like features.
description_view_2: The back and side of the projector are visible, with the projection surface and window-like features more prominent.
description_view_3: An angled view showing the window-like features and the projection surface from above.
